rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods section as a direct precedent for the paper's two-stage estimation strategy. The authors explicitly say they follow Che et al. (2007) and Pancras and Sudhir (2007) when estimating demand first and then moving to supply-side estimation, and they discuss why this limited-information approach is advantageous. This is not just background citation; it supports a core empirical design choice in the study.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the two-stage demand-then-supply estimation approach associated with Pancras and Sudhir (2007) to its own nonlinear pricing setting. The cited work serves as a methodological template for the estimation strategy rather than a domain-specific CDI input.
